violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment is to apply for a RICFSM with RIDOH. Application was printed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 04/20/2026

Pizza pans were observed being stored on an unclean surface (storage rack). Equipment and utensils must be stored in a clean and dry location to prevent contamination. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026

The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the kitchen. Establishment is to obtain thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device. New Violation. Correct By: 04/20/2026

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. -Walk-in cooler shelves -All storage shelves -Dishwasher -Prep unit Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026

Stagnant water was observed by the dish machine and grease trap area. No active leak observed at the time of inspection. Per PIC, service has been called due to unknown stagnant water. Establishment is to mop water. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026

The door to the outside, located in the front entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -Pizza prep unit, -Pizza cooker, -Food storage bins, -Drying rack. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025

Dishwasher was observed with an air break where an air gap is required. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025
A leak was observed at the 3 bay sink faucet/sprayer hose. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025

The floors throughout the facility (especially under and behind equipment) have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025

The door to the outside, located in the front entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2023

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. - Refrigerator shelving - Shelving throughout food preparation/dry storage area - Dish racks - Fryer PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2023

The floors in the kitchen and walk-in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/13/2023

Inspector observed the wall behind the three bay sink to have black and brown residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2023
The wall junctures in the frying area do not have coving. The wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/13/2023
Inspector observed walk-in freezer to have ice/frost buildup. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2023
